<?php
// <auto-generated/>
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Koine\Sales\ReadModels;

use Koine\Sales\ValueObjects\Order;

final readonly class OrderView
{
    public function __construct(
        public int $doubled
    ) {}
}

/** Projects Order to OrderView. */
function toOrderView(Order $src): OrderView
{
    return new OrderView(
        $src->doubled(),
    );
}
